functions.description: Express middleware — extracts Bearer token from Authorization header, verifies JWT, attaches user to req
functions.current_behavior: Returns 401 if no token or invalid. Sets req.user on success.
functions.runtime_evidence: Verified via deploy API health check (routes behind it return 200)
issues_found: JWT_SECRET has hardcoded fallback 'agentcore-v3-secret-key-2026'
functions.recommended_action: Remove hardcoded JWT_SECRET fallback
functions.notes: Core auth middleware. No token expiry refresh mechanism.

functions.description: Checks if workspace trial has expired. Returns 402 if TRIAL plan and trialEndsAt is in past.
functions.current_behavior: Blocks access with 402 + Russian error message when trial expired.
functions.runtime_evidence: Deploy script tested billing/trial-status endpoint (200 response)
issues_found: Tight coupling to Prisma
Date comparison uses client's server time
Only applied on /chat/completions — NOT on messages, webchat, agents
functions.recommended_action: Apply checkTrial consistently across all protected endpoints
functions.notes: Inconsistently applied — chat completions has it, but conversations/messages endpoint does NOT

functions.description: Fetches AI models from Suggy API with 60-second in-memory cache.
functions.current_behavior: Returns cached data if <60s old. Falls back to stale cache or empty array on error.
issues_found: Hardcoded API key fallback
No retry logic
Cache is per-process, not shared across instances
functions.recommended_action: Add retry with exponential backoff. Consider Redis for multi-instance cache.
functions.notes: Working correctly. 60s TTL is reasonable.

functions.description: Smart model router — selects best AI model based on regex matching of task description. Handles: image generation, vision, long docs, coding, reasoning, writing, general chat.
functions.current_behavior: Returns first matching model or falls back to any chat-capable model.
functions.runtime_evidence: Verified indirectly — chat completion endpoint works (deploy_all.py tested chat response)
issues_found: Regex patterns may never match if model IDs change
No logging of routing decisions
Hardcoded model name fallbacks like 'accounts/fireworks/models/glm-5p1'
functions.recommended_action: Add logging for model routing decisions. Add configurable model priority lists.
functions.notes: Solid regex-based router. Depends entirely on Suggy model naming conventions.

functions.description: Registers user with email+password, creates workspace with 7-day TRIAL, creates 4 default agents with smart model routing.
functions.current_behavior: Creates User + Workspace + 4 Agents in one flow. Returns JWT token.
functions.runtime_evidence: Verified: deploy_all.py registered user final_audit3@test.com successfully
issues_found: No rate limiting on registration
Password strength only checked as min 6 chars
Default agent creation could fail silently (createMany skipDuplicates)
No transaction wrapping for user+workspace+agents creation
functions.recommended_action: Add rate limiting. Wrap in Prisma transaction. Validate password strength.
functions.notes: Registration works but lacks transaction safety. If agent creation fails, user+workspace are already committed.

functions.description: Authenticates user with email+password, returns JWT token with 7-day expiry.
functions.current_behavior: Returns accessToken + user info on success. 401 on bad credentials.
issues_found: No rate limiting — brute force possible
No account lockout after failed attempts
functions.recommended_action: Add rate limiting + account lockout. Add express-rate-limit usage.
functions.notes: express-rate-limit is in package.json but not used.

functions.description: Returns current user profile with workspace data.
functions.current_behavior: Returns user id, name, email, role, workspace. 404 if user deleted.
functions.runtime_evidence: Verified: deploy_all.py tested me endpoint — returned name + workspace
issues_found: Returns password hash if not selective with Prisma select (currently ok via default)
functions.recommended_action: Explicitly select fields to prevent accidental password leak.
functions.notes: Working correctly.

functions.description: Returns list of available AI models in OpenAI-compatible format.
functions.current_behavior: Returns { object: 'list', data: models[] }.
functions.runtime_evidence: Verified: deploy_all.py tested — returned model count
issues_found: No authentication required — publicly exposes model list
functions.recommended_action: Consider auth or rate limiting on this endpoint.
functions.notes: OpenAI-compatible format. Good for interoperability.

functions.description: OpenAI-compatible chat completions. Smart model routing, streaming support, saves conversation to DB.
functions.current_behavior: Routes model, calls Suggy API, saves conversation+messages to DB, returns response with _meta.
functions.runtime_evidence: Verified: deploy_all.py tested chat — got valid AI response
issues_found: checkTrial middleware applied here but not on other chat endpoints
Conversation saved BEFORE AI response confirmed — if AI fails, orphaned conversation remains
Streaming pipes raw response without error handling on stream
functions.recommended_action: Save conversation AFTER AI response. Handle stream errors properly.
functions.notes: Core endpoint. Works correctly. Error handling for timeout/429 is good.

functions.description: Generates images via Suggy API using flux models.
functions.current_behavior: Auto-selects image model if not specified. Proxies to Suggy.
functions.runtime_evidence: Not explicitly tested. Same pattern as chat completions.
issues_found: No checkTrial middleware — free usage possible
No usage tracking/cost logging
functions.recommended_action: Add checkTrial middleware. Add usage tracking.
functions.notes: Pattern matches chat completions. Likely works.

functions.description: Lists all agents for current workspace.
functions.current_behavior: Returns all agents ordered by createdAt desc. No pagination.
functions.expected_behavior: Should support pagination for production use.
functions.runtime_evidence: Indirect — agents are created during registration, readable via API
issues_found: NO PAGINATION — will return ALL agents at once
No search/filter support
functions.recommended_action: Add pagination (skip/take). Add search by name.
functions.notes: Works. Not scalable without pagination.

functions.description: Creates a new AI agent for workspace. Validates model exists.
functions.current_behavior: Checks model validity against Suggy models. Creates agent with defaults.
functions.runtime_evidence: Default agents created on registration work.
issues_found: Model validation requires fetchModels() — adds latency
No limit on agent count per workspace
No validation for systemPrompt length/security
functions.recommended_action: Add agent count limit. Validate systemPrompt sanitization.
functions.notes: Works. Model validation is a nice touch.

functions.description: Updates agent fields. Scoped to workspace.
functions.current_behavior: Uses updateMany with id+workspaceId filter. Returns updateMany result (count).
functions.expected_behavior: Should return updated agent object, not count.
issues_found: Uses updateMany — returns { count: 0/1 } instead of agent object
No 404 if agent not found
No validation of updated fields
functions.recommended_action: Use findFirst + update or update with select. Return full agent. Return 404 if not found.
functions.notes: API contract misleading — returns count instead of object.

functions.description: Deletes agent from workspace.
functions.current_behavior: Returns { success: true } even if agent didn't exist.
functions.expected_behavior: Should return 404 if agent not found.
issues_found: Always returns success even if no rows deleted
Conversation relations have onDelete: SetNull — orphaned conversations
functions.recommended_action: Check deleted count. Return 404 if 0.
functions.notes: Idempotent by design but misleading response.

functions.description: Lists conversations with agent info and messages for workspace.
functions.current_behavior: Returns ALL conversations. No pagination. Includes all messages.
functions.expected_behavior: Should paginate. Should not return all messages by default.
issues_found: NO PAGINATION — huge payload possible with many conversations
Includes ALL messages by default — N+1 problem
No filter by date/status
functions.recommended_action: Add pagination. Don't include messages by default. Add date filters.
functions.notes: Critical performance risk for workspaces with many conversations.

functions.description: Creates new conversation.
functions.current_behavior: Creates with optional title and agentId.
issues_found: Missing userId field (deprecated in schema but route doesn't set it)
functions.recommended_action: None — basic CRUD works.
functions.notes: Simple. Works.

functions.description: Gets single conversation with messages and agent.
functions.current_behavior: Returns conversation. 404 if not found or wrong workspace.
issues_found: Returns all messages — could be large for long conversations
functions.recommended_action: Consider message pagination for long conversations.
functions.notes: Works. Scoped to workspace.

functions.description: Adds message to conversation. If user message, auto-generates AI reply using smart routing + conversation history.
functions.current_behavior: Saves user message, looks up agent model, fetches history, calls Suggy, saves AI response.
functions.runtime_evidence: Not tested directly. Same AI call pattern as chat completions.
issues_found: NO checkTrial middleware — bypass trial restrictions
Large history payload without truncation
AI call blocks response — no streaming support
Error handling saves error as assistant message (confusing UX)
functions.recommended_action: Add checkTrial. Add streaming. Limit history length. Return errors as separate field.
functions.notes: Big function (100 lines). Complex logic. No trial check is a billing bypass.

functions.description: Public web chat endpoint — NO AUTHENTICATION. Creates/finds conversation by sessionId, saves message, generates AI response.
functions.current_behavior: Open to anyone who knows a workspaceId. Creates conversations, consumes AI tokens.
functions.expected_behavior: Should have at minimum API key auth or CSRF protection.
issues_found: CRITICAL: NO AUTHENTICATION — anyone can use and consume credits
No rate limiting
No workspaceId validation (could brute-force IDs)
No CSRF protection
No checkTrial — billing bypass
functions.recommended_action: Add API key or token-based auth. Add rate limiting. Validate workspaceId ownership.
functions.notes: MOST CRITICAL SECURITY ISSUE in the project.

functions.description: Returns current workspace plan and hardcoded limits.
functions.current_behavior: Returns plan, trialEndsAt, settings, and hardcoded limits object.
issues_found: Limits object is HARDCODED, not from DB or config
Doesn't reflect plan-specific limits dynamically
functions.recommended_action: Move limits to config or DB. Make plan-specific.
functions.notes: Works but limits are static.

functions.description: Calculates trial days remaining.
functions.current_behavior: Returns trialEndsAt, daysLeft, isTrialing, isExpired.
functions.recommended_action: None.
functions.notes: Clean implementation.

functions.description: Returns message and conversation counts for current month.
functions.current_behavior: Counts total messages and conversations. Does NOT filter by month despite returning month field.
issues_found: Returns month in response but does NOT actually filter by month — returns ALL-TIME counts
Misleading API contract
functions.recommended_action: Add createdAt date filtering for current month. Or rename response field to 'total'.
functions.notes: API contract bug — says 'month' but returns all-time.

functions.description: Updates workspace settings with Zod validation. Merges with existing settings.
functions.current_behavior: Validates input, merges with current settings JSON, updates workspace.
issues_found: Settings merge uses spread — doesn't deep merge nested objects
Zod schema allows arbitrary extra fields not in schema
functions.recommended_action: Use deep merge. Strict Zod schema.
functions.notes: Good use of Zod validation.

functions.description: Lists CRM contacts for workspace.
functions.current_behavior: Returns all contacts, no pagination.
issues_found: NO PAGINATION
functions.recommended_action: Add pagination.
functions.notes: Basic CRUD. No pagination.

functions.description: Creates CRM contact.
functions.current_behavior: Spreads req.body directly into Prisma create. No field whitelist.
issues_found: No field whitelisting — {...req.body} allows arbitrary fields
No Zod validation
Could set fields not in schema (Prisma will reject but should validate early)
functions.recommended_action: Add Zod schema. Whitelist allowed fields. Don't spread req.body.
functions.notes: Security risk — mass assignment vulnerability.

functions.description: Lists knowledge documents.
functions.current_behavior: No pagination. No search.
issues_found: NO PAGINATION
functions.recommended_action: Add pagination.
functions.notes: Basic.

functions.description: Creates knowledge document.
functions.current_behavior: Spreads req.body. No validation.
issues_found: Mass assignment via {...req.body}
No Zod validation
functions.recommended_action: Add Zod validation. Whitelist fields.
functions.notes: Same mass-assignment risk as CRM.

functions.description: Returns dashboard analytics: conversation count, message count, agent count, customer count, recent user messages.
functions.current_behavior: Parallel queries via Promise.all. Shows recent 5 user messages.
issues_found: No time range filtering — totals are all-time
message.content substring could cut multi-byte chars
No caching
functions.recommended_action: Add time range filter. Add caching.
functions.notes: Good use of Promise.all for parallel queries.

functions.description: Public health check. Returns status, version, timestamp, loaded model list.
functions.current_behavior: Always returns 200 with model info.
functions.expected_behavior: Should indicate if models failed to load.
issues_found: Always returns 200 even if models fail to load
No DB health check
functions.recommended_action: Return 503 if models empty. Add DB connectivity check.
functions.notes: Works. Could be more informative.

functions.description: Global Express error handler. Catches unhandled errors.
functions.current_behavior: Logs error, returns 500 with Russian message.
issues_found: Doesn't catch async errors without express-async-errors package
Returns generic message — no error tracking ID
functions.recommended_action: Add express-async-errors. Add error tracking ID. Return different codes per error type.
functions.notes: Express 4 doesn't catch async errors natively.

functions.description: Startup log.
functions.current_behavior: Prints startup info to console.
functions.runtime_evidence: Verified: deploy logs show startup messages
functions.recommended_action: None.
functions.notes: Trivial. Works.

functions.description: Graceful shutdown on SIGTERM. Closes HTTP server, disconnects Prisma.
functions.current_behavior: Closes server, disconnects DB, exits.
issues_found: No SIGINT handler
No timeout — could hang if connections don't close
Only closes started server, not awaiting in-progress requests
functions.recommended_action: Add SIGINT handler. Add shutdown timeout. Track in-flight requests.
functions.notes: Basic graceful shutdown. Needs hardening.
